text:
I'm not sure what DK was doing... but C9 beating DK wasn't in my books... 

Honestly if Smash was on literally any actual ADC it would've been over

Congrats to C9 though! https://t.co/NgB2RP6jZW

Couldn't really wait for MSI so I decided to bet on the cross-regional showmatches, making ~$600!

Most games were 1 sided, and I'm pleasantly surprised that FLY managed to take a game off of DNS

However, DK stomped FLY and it wasn't even close.. huge gap between KR and NA still https://t.co/aNHhyoWnfI
With the amount of TRILLIONS that AI companies are raising, 500 million seems like a drop in the ocean for permanently curing the flu…

Farmed a lot of liquidity rewards today, making almost $80! 

Feels great to earn "free" money, especially because the majority of it was on a market I was heavily invested in already. 

Geopolitical markets usually have high yields so keep an eye out for those! https://t.co/t80tmfJM2J

Put some money on SPCX dipping, making around ~$1.5k in unrealized profit so far.

I think it still has room to fall, especially when there's fear of insiders selling after their investment lockup period is over.

They would need to reach under $151 and $113 to hit under 2T and 1.5T respectively. 

With the current market conditions hopefully it'll drop more before the end of month!

GRID x Polymarket???? 

This has huge implications for LoL games and I’m excited to see the implementation on Polymarket!!

Got 2nd in the first round of the @HiveLiveHQ  trading tournament.

My group is fairly chill compared to some of the others, so hopefully that continues throughout the next rounds!

Need to be top 2 in overall points to pass group stages which I think should be achievable. https://t.co/QKuEsxwNfw

I finally made it. Turned 3k into 100k.

I joined Polymarket around October of last year.

At the end of 2025, I gained over $10,000. 

Now, halfway through 2026, I've turned that 3k into over $100,000!

Thank you to @Polymarket for providing this opportunity <3 

Next goal: ??? https://t.co/xSGWr56bLk
Almost 100k... do I gamble the last bit on up down crypto https://t.co/xcl0XK4zCa

Decent week on my trading week back on @Polymarket !

I got lucky with a few games and unlucky with a few others... I'll complain a little bit about it but it is what it is

LCK has been insane to watch these past few games

Can't wait for MSI! https://t.co/Pzqk7YHuQM
ok so this is actually crazy

The first match ended in a tie, keeping the $625 Combo alive!

Still giving the entire slip to everyone that comments on the post! https://t.co/88GRxd30Ta

Took a rather larger position here because my quant @LolakisPM said it's a lock. 

Risking 7.2k to earn $300 isn't the greatest feeling in the world but still worth taking in this case! https://t.co/BLQAZANTQX

I know nothing about the World Cup, but since @Polymarket released Combos, I want to test it out for fun 

If this hits, I'll give 1 random comment in this post everything I earn here! 

Good luck :D https://t.co/qmpJ6yEcni

Back to ATHs!

Not sure why it's bugging though; I should be at around ~95.5k PnL, with +1k today. 

Made a risky bet on Asia Masters after seeing SGW was much better than the odds showed; it was +EV but there was no liquidity to sell, thank god they won

Trying for 100k (again) https://t.co/3ikxA92mhj

Big release for AI fanatics! Mythos (named Fable) was released by Anthropic today, and Polymarket added a lot of rewards in these markets as well in anticipation for its release. 

Definitely one of my bigger liquidity farming days, and a nice win for my Claude 5 Market play! https://t.co/mCMxdgSf9X

An interesting and rare market occured in LoL yesterday, making me ~$1.2k!

FN Esports were supposed to play vs Verdant, but FN Esports ff'd before the match started as they were missing a player. 

If they ff'd during the match, it would have been treated as Verdant's win. However, since it happened before the match even started, it goes to 50/50.

I initially was bonding it at 49c, until it was bought up by bots that didn't read the rules clearly (if they could read at all...). 

This tanked the price and allowed me to scoop up some shares for cheap (2c even)! 

Always keep an eye out on the rules in Polymarket!
2% is 2% higher than it should be https://t.co/cZBnZhxcRh

Honestly I'm pretty surprised to have a Silver badge on Polymarket when I haven't been trading a lot recently... Gold seems to be out of reach though! 

8% taker rebate certainly isn't much but it's something at least 😅 https://t.co/Ndx6iT4lrf

I woke up in the middle of the night and couldn't fall back asleep so I decided to tune into @Polymarket and the LCK series.

Got an insane comeback from KT in game 4, allowing me to buy KT at 1.3c for ML and 6c for the game itself - making around $1.1k in total! https://t.co/xgj8CeqS3b
